sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8895" key="a)nqrwpo/mimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθρωπό-μῑμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8895.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">imitating men,</tr_> Ps.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Flun.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
